title: get_blocking: undocumented limitation with stores that spawn tokio tasks internally
description: secretx-core/src/lib.rs get_blocking() spawns a scoped thread with its own current-thread runtime when called inside an existing runtime. If the inner store calls tokio::spawn() or tokio::task::spawn_blocking() internally, those tasks run on the scoped thread's runtime and are dropped when that runtime is dropped (after block_on returns). This silently cancels background work the store may depend on. Trigger: any backend that internally uses tokio::spawn() is wrapped in a CachingStore and get_blocking() is called from within an existing runtime → background tasks are silently dropped. The docs should warn about this, and ideally CachingStore should document it too.
